topic: Adversary Pursuit: Design a gamified cyber threat intelligence hunting and OSINT pivoting framework as a v1 multi-platform Python CLI application. The interface should feel like a combination of Metasploit (modular console with commands, sessions, workspaces) and CTFd (scoring, challenges, progression, team leaderboards). Research: (1) The best Python CLI frameworks for building Metasploit-like interactive consoles (cmd2, prompt_toolkit, rich, textual, etc.), (2) CTFd's architecture and gamification patterns (scoring, badges, challenges, modes), (3) Comprehensive CTI and OSINT data source APIs from GitHub awesome lists (awesome-threat-intelligence, awesome-osint, awesome-ioc) including VirusTotal, Shodan, Censys, PassiveTotal/RiskIQ, URLScan, HaveIBeenPwned, Maltego transforms, and OSINT Tool aggregators, (4) Existing open-source threat hunting frameworks and their architectures (MISP, OpenCTI, TheHive, IntelOwl, SpiderFoot), (5) How to structure a plugin/module system for extensible tool integration. Focus on practical implementation patterns for Python 3.12+.
